title: CaneyCloud: The Property Management Ecosystem for Venezuela's Tourism Rebirth
abstract: Venezuela sits five hours from New York with natural assets rivaling the world's most visited destinations, yet receives roughly 90% less tourism than neighboring Colombia. As the 2026 transition reopens the country to global capital, this paper lays out the CaneyCloud thesis: an all-in-one property management system, built by Venezuelans for Venezuela, positioned as the operational gateway for an addressable hospitality market scaling from $390M to $1.97B.
